mission.title: argo-rollouts: Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via Ingress
mission.description: Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via Ingress. Requested by 23+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-rollouts deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
helm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation.

steps.title: Review argo-rollouts configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
It would be very helpful if the GUI Dashboard was served by the operator itself, so that we could setup a stable URL for people to use to see the current rollout status.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via…
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
Error: unknown command "dashboard" for "kubectl-argo-rollouts"
Run 'kubectl-argo-rollouts --help' for usage.
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Provide manifests so rollout dashboard can be accessed via…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/pull/1240
codeSnippets:
Error: unknown command "dashboard" for "kubectl-argo-rollouts"
Run 'kubectl-argo-rollouts --help' for usage.

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

resources:
- rbac.yaml
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-deployment.yaml
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-service.yaml
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/master/manifests/dashboard-install/dashboard-serviceaccount.yaml

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: argo-rollouts-dashboard
    app.kubernetes.io/name: argo-rollouts-dashboard
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argo-rollouts
  name: argo-rollouts-dashboard
rules:
- apiGroups:
  - argoproj.io
  resources:
  - rollouts
  - rollouts/status
  - rollouts/finalizers
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
  - watch
  - update
  - patch
- apiGroups:
  - argoproj.io
  resources:
  - analysisruns
  - analysisruns/finalizers
  - experiments
  - experiments/finalizers
  verbs:
  - create
  - get
  - list
  - watch
- apiGroups:
  - argoproj.io
  resources:
  - analysistemplates
  - clusteranalysistemplates
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
  - watch
- apiGroups:
  - apps
  resources:
  - replicasets
  verbs:
  - get

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible.
